docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF RENTS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AL ANOLIK. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AL ANOLIK. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SF RENTS AS TO DEFENDANT MASTERPIECE PAINTING, INC. & TERRENCE A. JOHNSON JOHNSON, TERRENCE A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF RENTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASTERPIECE PAINTING, INC. & TERRENCE A.
